narrative:
Moorefield Township has 9,100 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.0 percentage points.
